title: build_request hardcodes jmap:chat capability — wrong for quota/push methods
description: Why: methods/mod.rs build_request always emits using:[jmap:core, jmap:chat]. Quota methods require jmap:quotas, PushSubscription methods require RFC 8620 section 7 capability. Sending the wrong using list may cause the server to return unknownCapability. What: Either add a capabilities parameter to build_request, or have quota/push methods build their own JmapRequest directly with the correct using list.
